chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دُخُولِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَ زِيَارَةِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ قَبْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 216 – Entering Al-Medina and Ziyarah of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, and the supplication at his<sup>saww</sup> grave

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/262)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/262)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) كَيْفَ السَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عِنْدَ قَبْرِهِ فَقَالَ قُلِ السَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حَبِيبَ اللَّهِ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفْوَةَ اللَّهِ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِينَ اللَّهِ

أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ نَصَحْتَ لِأُمَّتِكَ وَ جَاهَدْتَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَ عَبَدْتَهُ حَتَّى أَتَاكَ الْيَقِينُ فَجَزَاكَ اللَّهُ أَفْضَلَ مَا جَزَى نَبِيّاً عَنْ أُمَّتِهِ اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ.

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘How is the greetings to be upon Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> at his<sup>saww</sup> grave?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Say, ‘The greetings be upon Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>! The greetings be upon you<sup>saww</sup>, O Beloved of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! The greetings be upon you<sup>saww</sup>, O elite of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! The greetings be upon you<sup>saww</sup>, O trustworthy one of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>!

I hereby testify that you<sup>saww</sup> did preach to your<sup>saww</sup> community, and struggled in the Way of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and worshipped Him<sup>azwj</sup> until conviction came to you<sup>saww</sup>. So, may Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Recompense you<sup>saww</sup> with the most superior of what He<sup>azwj</sup> would Recompense a Prophet<sup>as</sup> of a community. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Send Blessings upon Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>, and the Progeny<sup>asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>, Superior than what You<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed upon Ibrahim<sup>as</sup> and the progeny of Ibrahim<sup>as</sup>, You<sup>azwj</sup> being the Praised One, the Glorious’’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “I asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ’How is al-Salam offered to the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, near his grave?’ He (the Imam) replied, one should say, ’(I hereby declare, affirm and acknowledge that you are a ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and my) submission to (the commandments of) the Messenger of Allah. (I hereby declare, affirm and acknowledge that you are a ‘Alayhi al-Salam and my) submission to (your commandments) O the beloved one to Allah. (I hereby declare, affirm and acknowledge that you are a ‘Alayhi al-Salam and my) submission to (your commandments) O chosen person of Allah. (I hereby declare, affirm and acknowledge that you are a ‘Alayhi al-Salam and my) submission to (your commandments) O trusted person of Allah. I testify that you gave good advice to your followers, strove hard for the cause of Allah and worshipped Him to the time of your death. May Allah grant you the best of reward that He has granted to His prophets for their service to their followers. O Allah, grant salawat (favors and compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause), the best of favors and compensations that You have granted to Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and the family of Ibrahim; You are praiseworthy and glorious.”
